products.title: Gift Card
products.description: Shopping for someone else but not sure what to give them ? Give them the gift of choice with a CLAE Gift Card . Gift cards are delivered digitally by email and contain instructions to redeem them at checkout. Our gift cards have no additional processing fees. The card is valid up to 12 months after date of purchase, exclusively on www.clae.com
